zh.Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mohun Earl of Somerset於大約1090年出生在法國諾門迪可騰時，他的父親William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster47歲，母親Adeline de Ponthieu32歲。他於1130年與Alice De Gant在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1145年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特享年57歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特登斯特。

zh-hans.Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mohun Earl of Somerset于大约1090年出生在法国諾門迪可騰时，他的父亲William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster47岁，母亲Adeline de Ponthieu32岁。他于1130年与Alice De Gant在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1145年在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特享年57岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特登斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mohun Earl of Somerset was born about 1090, in Cotentin, Normandy, France, his father, William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster, was 47 and his mother, Adeline de Ponthieu, was 32. He married Alice De Gant in 1130, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He registered for military service in 1066. He died about 1145, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Dunster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Mohun Earl of Somerset est né environ 1090, à Cotentin, Normandie, France, son père, William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Ponthieu, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Gant en 1130, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé environ 1145, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Mohun Earl of Somerset um 1090 in Cotentin, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster 47 und seine Mutter Adeline de Ponthieu 32. Er hat 1130 in England, United Kingdom Alice De Gant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1145 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunster, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun Earl of Somerset è nato il circa 1090 nel Cotentin, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Adeline de Ponthieu, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice De Gant nel 1130, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì circa 1145, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunster, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mohun Earl of Somersetが約1090年にフランスノーマンディコテンティンで生まれた時，父William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunsterは47歳，母Adeline de Ponthieuは32歳であった。1130年にイギリスイギリスでAlice De Gantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1145年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで57歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトダンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mohun Earl of Somerset(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 노먼디 컷틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline de Ponthieu(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice De Gant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 던스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun Earl of Somerset nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Cotentin, Normandie, França, seu pai, William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Ponthieu, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice De Gant em 1130, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1145, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mohun Earl of Somerset родился около 1090 г. в местности котентинь, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Ponthieu, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Gant в 1130 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1145 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия.

sm.Abt 1090–Abt 1145: e tusa o le 1090–e tusa o le 1145

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Mohun Earl of Somerset nació aproximadamente 1090, en Cotentin, Normandie, Francia, su papá, William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Adeline de Ponthieu, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alice De Gant en 1130, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió aproximadamente 1145, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
